def positive_sqlmodel_session_exec_in_loop():
    rule_id = "sqlmodel_session_exec_in_loop"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "SQLModel Session.exec(...) is called inside loops instead of combining the query shape."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
